title: Immersive Backrooms
description: This in-progress Fabric mod is my interpretation of the Backrooms in Minecraft!
body:
## Welcome to the Backrooms, Traveler. ##

It seems you have noclipped out of the bounds of reality, and into a bizarre new world. We'd like to  
welcome you to the "Backrooms", an alternate dimension where the laws of physics cease to apply.

\- Scutoid, Backrooms Wiki Homepage



-----


The Backrooms is an intriguing concept, one that I, along with many other people, have poured hours into exploring -- from watching YouTube videos, to delving through the depths of the [**Backrooms Wiki**](https://backrooms.fandom.com/wiki/Backrooms_Wiki). What better way to immerse oneself further into the Backrooms than through personal experience? Although there are already some Backrooms mods out there for Minecraft, they weren't quite what I was looking for. I chose to make my own version, which blends the standard Backrooms lore from the [**Backrooms Wiki**](https://backrooms.fandom.com/wiki/Backrooms_Wiki) with some aspects of [**Kane Pixels'**](https://www.youtube.com/@kanepixels) own Backrooms series. I plan to make this mod a long-term project, although I will be working on it in my spare time. This means it might not be updated frequently, but more content (e.g. new Backrooms levels and other features) will be added over time.

![Image of Backrooms Level 0](https://i.imgur.com/BzoWdIV.png)

## **Mod Information** ##

[![Requires Fabric API](https://i.imgur.com/Ol1Tcf8.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)

This mod is an addon for [**Tech Reborn**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/techreborn).

**Mod loader:** Fabric  
**Required mods:** Fabric API, Tech Reborn, and [**Immersive Portals**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/immersive-portals-mod)  
**Current Minecraft Version(s):** 1.20.4

Version 0.1.0 of this mod uses [**customportalapi**](https://github.com/kyrptonaught/customportalapi) instead of [**Immersive Portals**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/immersive-portals-mod).

## **Credits** ##

**Mod author:** me  
**Textures:** me  
(except the machine textures, which are based on machine textures from Tech Reborn)  
**Music:** me

See the [**GitHub page**](https://github.com/crafter312/fabric-backrooms) for the mod source files, as well as a wiki (not written yet) and to submit any issues or bug reports. If you have suggestions, feel free to leave them as comments here or on the GitHub page!

Many thanks to everyone who have helped me debug some difficult issues and improve my modding skills, especially to qouteall (the creator of Immersive Portals) and members of the Modded Minecraft discord server.

**This mod is Fabric only, and will be worked on and updated according to my personal schedule.**
